records.question: What methods named exactly "r lens prop" have comments in XML format and belong to solution IDs of at least 162106?

SELECT method.id FROM method
WHERE method.commentisxml = 1 AND method.solutionid >= 162106 AND method.nametokenized = 'r lens prop'

SELECT Id
FROM Method
WHERE Name = 'r lens prop'
AND CommentIsXml = 1
AND SolutionId >= 162106
